001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.network;
002
003import com.google.common.io.ByteArrayDataInput;
004import java.util.HashMap;
005import java.util.Map;
006import java.util.function.Function;
007import net.pl3x.guithium.api.Guithium;
008import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
009import net.pl3x.guithium.api.network.packet.HelloPacket;
010import net.pl3x.guithium.api.network.packet.Packet;
011import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
012import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
013
014/**
015 * Represents a network handler. All packets are registered here.
016 */
017public abstract class NetworkHandler {
018    /**
019     * A unique identifier for the network channel between client and server.
020     */
021    public final static String CHANNEL = String.format("%1$s:%1$s", Guithium.MOD_ID);
022
023    private final Map<Key, Function<ByteArrayDataInput, ? extends Packet>> packets = new HashMap<>();
024
025    /**
026     * Create a new network handler instance
027     */
028    public NetworkHandler() {
029        registerListener(HelloPacket.KEY, HelloPacket::new);
030    }
031
032    /**
033     * Register the network listeners
034     */
035    public abstract void registerListeners();
036
037    /**
038     * Register incoming packet handlers.
039     *
040     * @param key      Identifying key
041     * @param function Packet handler
042     */
043    protected void registerListener(@NotNull Key key, @NotNull Function<ByteArrayDataInput, ? extends Packet> function) {
044        this.packets.put(key, function);
045    }
046
047    /**
048     * Receive data.
049     *
050     * @param connection Connection to receive on
051     * @param data       Raw data received
052     */
053    public void receive(@NotNull Connection connection, byte[] data) {
054        Packet packet = getPacket(Packet.in(data));
055        if (packet != null) {
056            packet.handle(connection.getPacketListener());
057        }
058    }
059
060    /**
061     * Get the packet from the raw input data.
062     *
063     * @param in Raw input data
064     * @return The packet for the data, or null if not recognized
065     */
066    @Nullable
067    protected Packet getPacket(@NotNull ByteArrayDataInput in) {
068        // verify protocol
069        int protocol = in.readInt();
070        if (protocol != Guithium.PROTOCOL) {
071            Guithium.logger.warn("Received packet with invalid protocol ({}) from server", protocol);
072            return null;
073        }
074
075        // get registered packet handler
076        Key packetId = Key.of(in.readUTF());
077        Function<ByteArrayDataInput, ? extends Packet> function = this.packets.get(packetId);
078        if (function == null) {
079            Guithium.logger.warn("Received unknown packet ({}) from player", packetId);
080            return null;
081        }
082        return function.apply(in);
083    }
084}
